---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or behavior.
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement, triage
assignees: ''
---

## What workflow does this unblock

<!-- Describe the job-to-be-done, not just the feature. Who benefits and how? -->

## Proposed change

<!-- What would you add, change, or remove? If you have a rough API or UX in mind, sketch it. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Workarounds you tried, other tools that do this, or related issues. -->

## Scope

- [ ] Affects a single file or module (small)
- [ ] Affects multiple modules (medium — likely needs a design note)
- [ ] New subsystem or cross-cutting change (large — please open a discussion first)

## Willing to send a PR?

- [ ] Yes, I can draft one
- [ ] Yes, with guidance
- [ ] No, requesting only
